metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced woodworking skills in cabinet making and furniture design and construction. This course emphasizes joinery techniques, finish systems, design quality, and business practices for furniture and cabinetry careers.
metadata.general_description: Advanced cabinet making, furniture design, joinery, and professional finishing systems.

big_ideas.statement: Quality furniture combines aesthetic design, structural integrity, and fine craftsmanship
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful furniture integrates beautiful design with sound construction and quality materials.

big_ideas.statement: Cabinet making demands precision joinery, careful measurement, and attention to detail
big_ideas.elaboration: Cabinets require precise assembly and finishing to function well and appear professional.

big_ideas.statement: Furniture design balances aesthetics, function, durability, and manufacturability
big_ideas.elaboration: Designers must understand how furniture will be used and ensure designs can be built and maintained.

big_ideas.statement: Professional furniture makers combine technical skill, design knowledge, and business practices
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful furniture careers require woodworking mastery, design sense, and business acumen.

competencies.raw: Design functional and aesthetic furniture pieces
i_can_statements: I can sketch and develop furniture designs
I can consider human ergonomics
I can apply design principles
I can incorporate aesthetic elements

competencies.raw: Design cabinetry for specific spaces and purposes
i_can_statements: I can plan cabinet layouts
I can design storage solutions
I can plan hardware and accessories
I can create installation drawings
I can select appropriate joinery techniques
I can plan construction sequences
I can design for structural integrity
I can optimize for production efficiency

competencies.raw: Design furniture collections and production systems
i_can_statements: I can develop coordinated collections
I can plan batch production
I can design marketing materials
I can develop business strategies

competencies.raw: Apply precision joinery and assembly techniques
i_can_statements: I can execute mortise and tenon joints
I can create dovetail and other joints
I can assemble furniture accurately
I can achieve tight, quality joints
I can prepare surfaces for finishing
I can apply stains and finishes
I can achieve high-quality finishes
I can repair and restore finishes
I can build cabinets to specifications
I can install hardware and fixtures
I can set and level components
I can make final adjustments
I can troubleshoot construction problems
I can adapt designs for site conditions
I can innovate within design constraints
I can evaluate and improve work

competencies.raw: Use woodworking power tools and equipment safely
i_can_statements: I can operate table saws and planers
I can use routers and shapers
I can use joining and fastening equipment
I can maintain tools and equipment

competencies.raw: Use CNC and digital fabrication tools
i_can_statements: I can use CNC routers
I can program and set up equipment
I can optimize designs for CNC
I can integrate hand and machine work
I can create furniture designs digitally
I can develop detailed drawings
I can calculate materials and costs
I can create cutting lists and plans
I can photograph furniture professionally
I can create digital portfolios
I can use social media for marketing
I can manage online sales platforms
